narrative:
Deercreek/Williamsport (precinct in Pickaway County) has 981 registered voters, with 58.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.1%, a clear Republican lean of 11.7 percentage points.
